title: Coolplay Construction Vehicles Toy Set for Kids, Little Truck Cars Toy Roller Bulldozers Forklift Excavator Asphalt Car Dump for Boys 3 Years Old
features: Metal Diecast Construction Vehicle Set : Diggers and Dumpers toys, Street Roller, Bulldozers, Forklift, Asphalt Car 6 Pack.
Make your own construction toys, all vehicle toys have moving parts, such as lifting, dumping, mixing and digging. Ability to carry and transport sand and other materials for pretend play.

Kid cars toy with high simulation of large construction site wheels, can quickly move in the sand, grass ,cement floor and so on. Creating a realistic experience for your child whilst they enjoy play!
Main Material: metal & plastic; Package: box packaged.
Age allowed: ages 3 years and up
